clips.title: The Crossing
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, epic grade. A vast rippling sand desert under a huge sky, dunes stretching to the horizon, heat shimmer. Midday, harsh sun. A wide shot with a lone figure small in the frame, walking across the dunes, dwarfed by the landscape. A person in a dust-wrapped traveler's cloak. Hard warm light, immense scale, 24mm, wide shot. Deep focus, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Nave
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, grand grade. The vast interior of a gothic cathedral, soaring columns and arches, colored light from stained glass, a long stone floor. Day, hushed. A wide shot with a single person standing small in the center of the nave, looking up. A person in a long coat. Cool stone with warm light shafts, immense scale, 24mm, wide shot. Deep focus, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Edge
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, sweeping grade. A dramatic sea cliff at golden hour, waves crashing far below, endless ocean and sky. Evening, warm. A wide shot with a person small in the frame standing near the cliff edge, coat billowing, facing the sea. A person in a long windswept coat. Warm golden light, vast horizon, 24mm, wide shot. Deep focus, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: First Light
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, cinematic grade. An empty city street at dawn, long shadows, shuttered shops, mist on the asphalt. Early morning, soft. A wide shot with a person small in the frame walking down the middle of the deserted street. A person in a casual jacket. Cool dawn light, long perspective, 28mm, wide shot. Deep focus, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Atrium
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, sleek grade. A huge modern glass atrium, soaring open space, staircases and light, polished floor. Day, bright. A wide shot with a person small in the frame standing in the vast lobby, looking around. A person in smart business attire. Bright even light, immense clean space, 24mm, wide shot. Deep focus, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Woods
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, serene winter grade. A quiet snowy pine forest, tall trees laden with snow, soft falling flakes, untouched white ground. Overcast day, soft. A wide shot with a person small in the frame standing among the towering trees. A person in a warm winter coat. Soft cool light, hushed scale, 24mm, wide shot. Deep focus, subtle grain, 24fps.
